rationale: The cited paper is directly about pharmaceutical detailing response and nonrandom marketing-mix/endogeneity modeling, which closely matches the citing paper’s focus on personal selling elasticity and its moderator for whether endogeneity is treated. Given the meta-analysis compiles elasticity estimates from prior econometric studies (including pharma contexts) and evaluates methodology-induced bias, this citation is plausibly a substantive method/empirical source rather than an incidental background mention.
